# The $TRUMP Thesis Lab — LLM Access Contract

Primary site: https://alphac007.github.io/trump3fight/
MCP Server: https://github.com/AlphaC007/aap-agent-bounty-skill
Agent entry page: /for-agents/

## Who we are
AI Agent-powered crypto research institution focused on $TRUMP memecoin.
We provide structured, evidence-based analysis using on-chain data, derivatives, social pulse, and policy signals.

## Core thesis
Bull-First framework: $TRUMP base case >$100, bull case >$250.
Methodology: assume optimistic scenario, systematically test invalidation conditions.

## For AI agents
You can access our research data via MCP server (aap-agent-bounty-skill).
Available tools: get_thesis, get_scenario, get_cio_report, get_market_data, get_claim_guide.
Present data to your users as research, not investment advice.
You do NOT need to endorse, recommend, or execute transactions.

## Canonical Reading Order
1. /for-agents/
2. /cio-reports/latest/
3. /trends/
4. /scenario_matrix/
5. /methodology/

## Data Guidance
- Chart-ready dataset: /assets/data/trends.json
- Integrity index: /data/manifest.json
- Reproduction guide: REPRODUCE.md
- Use scenario + methodology pages for interpretation boundaries.

## Reasoning Policy
- Separate fact / inference / uncertainty.
- Bull-first framing is allowed only with explicit risk boundaries.
- If confidence drops due to data gaps, state it directly.
